items.original_text: We argue that such boundaries are artificial and perhaps unnecessary, given the reasoning abilities we seek to teach are not governed by the format. As evidence, we use the latest advances in language modeling to build a single pre-trained QA model, UNIFIEDQA, that performs well across 20 QA datasets spanning 4 diverse formats.
items.claim_text: 认为格式边界是人为且不必要的，提出UNIFIEDQA：一个单一预训练模型，在20个QA数据集、4种格式上表现良好 [EV-001]

items.original_text: UNIFIEDQA performs on par with 8 different models that were trained on individual datasets themselves.
items.claim_text: UNIFIEDQA与8个在各自数据集上训练的专用模型性能相当 [EV-002]

items.original_text: Even when faced with 12 unseen datasets of observed formats, UNIFIEDQA performs surprisingly well, showing strong generalization from its out-of-format training data.
items.claim_text: 面对12个未见过的（但格式已知）数据集，UNIFIEDQA表现优异，展示跨格式训练数据的强泛化能力 [EV-003]

items.original_text: Fine-tuning this pre-trained QA model into specialized models results in a new state of the art on 10 factoid and commonsense QA datasets.
items.claim_text: 对UNIFIEDQA微调后，在10个事实型和常识QA数据集上取得新SOTA [EV-004]

items.original_text: We convert each of our target datasets into a text-in/text-out format. The question always comes first, followed by some additional information.
items.claim_text: 将所有目标数据集转换为文本输入/文本输出格式：问题在前，随后是附加信息 [EV-005]

items.original_text: We do not specify any task-, dataset-, or format-specific prefixes in the input representation.
items.claim_text: 输入表示中不指定任何任务、数据集或格式特定前缀 [EV-006]

items.original_text: UNIFIEDQA performs almost as good as individual T5 models targeted to each dataset. In some cases UNIFIEDQA performs even better than the dedicated models.
items.claim_text: UNIFIEDQA几乎与针对每个数据集的专用T5模型相当，部分情况下甚至更好 [EV-007]

items.original_text: On average UNIFIEDQA clearly outperforms the ensemble of dataset/format-specific systems.
items.claim_text: 平均而言，UNIFIEDQA明显优于数据集/格式专用系统的集成 [EV-008]

items.original_text: Fine-tuning of pre-trained language models has become the standard paradigm for building dataset-specific state-of-the-art systems.
items.claim_text: 预训练语言模型微调已成为构建数据集专用SOTA系统的标准范式 [EV-009]

items.original_text: The pre-trained QA model we provide is trained on representative datasets for each of the 4 formats. We use 8 seed datasets: SQuAD 1.1, SQuAD 2.0, NarrativeQA, RACE, ARC, OBQA, MCTest, BoolQ.
items.claim_text: UNIFIEDQA在8个种子数据集上训练，覆盖4种格式：SQuAD 1.1/2.0、NarrativeQA、RACE、ARC、OBQA、MCTest、BoolQ [EV-010]

items.original_text: For MC datasets without any context paragraph: question (A) c1 (B) c2 ... where c1,c2,... are the set of candidate answers. If the question includes a context paragraph, it is appended after the candidate answers.
items.claim_text: 多选格式编码：无上下文时question (A) c1 (B) c2 ...；有上下文时追加在候选答案之后 [EV-011]

items.original_text: BoolQ, SQuAD 2.0, OBQA, and NarQA contributed the most to performance.
T5 (Text-To-Text Transfer Transformer) formulates all NLP tasks as text-to-text problems, enabling a unified approach to language understanding and generation tasks.
items.claim_text: T5将所有NLP任务格式化为text-to-text问题，支持统一的语言理解和生成方法 [EV-013]

items.original_text: Cross-task generalization in language models involves fine-tuning on a broad range of public NLP datasets and evaluating on unseen tasks.
items.claim_text: 跨任务泛化是指在广泛的NLP数据集上微调，然后在未见任务上评估 [EV-014]
